chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Crl.Transfer Appln.No.S-05 of 2022. _____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ________________________________________________________ 01. For orders on M.A.No.589/2022 (U/A). 02. For orders on office objection “A”. 03. For hearing of main case. 11.02.2022 Mr. Ali Madad Arijo, Advocate for the applicants. = * = * = * = * = * = 01. Urgency granted. 02. Deferred. 03. It is contended by learned counsel for the applicants that the behavior and attitude of learned 1st Additional Sessions Judge, Shikarpur, with the applicants is very harsh, therefore, in all fairness, the case of the applicants be transferred to any other Court of competent jurisdiction. Nothing has been brought on record which may suggest that in what manner the attitude of learned trial Judge is found to be harsh with the applicants. No criminal case could be transferred from one to other Court on the basis of false and self procured grounds. Consequently, the instant criminal transfer application is dismissed in limine. J
